name: Bounded Linear Operators
description: T: X→Y linear. Bounded ⇔ continuous. ℬ(X,Y) Banach. Open mapping, closed graph, inverse mapping. Adjoint T*.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: B(X,Y)\nbounded linear ops"]
    D2["Def: Adjoint T*\n⟨Tx,y⟩ = ⟨x,T*y⟩"]
    D3["Def: Kernel ker T\nnull space"]
    T1["Thm: Bounded ⇔\ncontinuous"]
    T2["Thm: Open mapping\nT surjective ⇒ T open"]
    T3["Thm: Closed graph\nGr T closed ⇒ T bounded"]
    T4["Thm: Inverse mapping\nT bijective ⇒ T⁻¹ bounded"]
    T5["Thm: (T*)* = T\non reflexive X"]
    L1["Lemma: ‖T*‖ = ‖T‖"]
    D1 --> T1
    D1 --> T2
    D2 --> T5
    D2 --> L1
    T2 --> T4
    T3 --> T2
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
    class L1 lemma
